thematicMap.title: Education Data Distribution by District
thematicMap.description: An OpenStreetMap-based interactive visualization for viewing schools, students, teachers, and school status across districts.
thematicMap.mapDescription: Choose a data theme, then click or hover over a district marker.

mapDescriptions.schools: The map shows total school distribution by district.
mapDescriptions.students: The map shows total student counts by district.
mapDescriptions.teachers: The map shows total teacher counts by district.

thematicMap.detailDescription: Thematic data summary for the selected district on the map.

detailDescriptions.schools: School details by status and education level in the selected district.
detailDescriptions.students: Student details for Teluk Bintuni Regency by education level.
detailDescriptions.teachers: Teacher details for Teluk Bintuni Regency by employment status and education level.

emptyMapMessages.students: Student data by district is not available yet, so this theme does not display map markers.
emptyMapMessages.teachers: Teacher data by district is not available yet, so this theme does not display map markers.

thematicMap.note: Note: this map uses district point markers based on OpenStreetMap because official administrative boundary GeoJSON is not available yet. Coordinates can be updated later according to official data.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Official Website of the Teluk Bintuni Regency Education Office.
welcome.headName: Dr. Henry D. Kapuangan, S.IP., S.Pd., MM
welcome.position: Head of the Teluk Bintuni Regency Education Office
paragraphs: This website is an information and public service platform provided to strengthen information transparency, improve service quality, and make it easier for the public to access various information and programs in the education sector.

We are committed to continuously improving education quality that is equitable, inclusive, and adaptive to developments in science and technology. Through collaboration between government, education units, educators, parents, and the entire community, we believe we can create a quality education ecosystem to realize Teluk Bintuni human resources who are intelligent, cultured, religious, and competitive.
May this website become a useful communication, information, and service medium for all people of Teluk Bintuni Regency.
